title: Cuneiform Tablet #0225: Neo-Babylonian Mathematical
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Babylonian period — a mathematical document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Babylonian period — a mathematical document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Neo-Babylonian period. Mathematical document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records mathematical matters typical of Neo-Babylonian period administrative or literary practice.
